title: Seen by People Column
excerpt:
Extremely important to know who has seen or not seen items. 
“Seen” in update helps, but not efficient. 
Also need automation recipes for this Seen By Column

posts.author: Summit22 (Cathleen Arnold)
posts.cookedHtml:
Extremely important to know who has seen or not seen items.
“Seen” in update helps, but not efficient.

Also need automation recipes for this Seen By Column

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Summit22

Maybe something to develop an app for. What would be the exact definition of “seen”? When you open / view a board you do “see” all the items. Or do you want “interacted with” for people that interacted with the item (open item card / view updates)?
